% Setup Guide:

%    http://www.LaTeXTemplates.com/template/the-legrand-orange-book
% 4. To compile without images, use the 'draft' option in \documentclass.

\documentclass[11pt,fleqn,oneside]{book} % Default font size and left-justified equations

%----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

%----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

\input{structure} % Contains the majority of the structure behind the template

\usepackage{tabularx} % Required for auto-wrapping wide tables

\begin{document}

{\begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture,overlay]

\draw[anchor=north] (midpoint) node [fill=ocre!30!white,fill opacity=0.6,text opacity=1,inner sep=1cm]{\Huge\centering\bfseries\sffamily\parbox[c][][t]{\paperwidth}{\centering Computer Organization and Design\\[15pt] % Book title
{\Large A Comprehensive CDA Course Review}\\[20pt] % Subtitle
{\huge University of Central Florida}}}; % Author name
\end{tikzpicture}};
\end{tikzpicture}
